name: Penne with Smothered Scallops, Tomato, Basil
recipeIngredient: 8 tomatoes - large, ripe or 2 cans Roma tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drop tomatoes, briefly into boiling water to loosen skins and peel. Remove most seeds and chop coarsely.
2. Slice scallops into thin rounds about 1/4-inch thick and place in a bowl with lemon rind.
3. Sauté garlic in oil until pale golden, then add the chopped tomatoes, salt, and hot pepper flakes. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Bring a large pot of water to boil, add salt, and cook pasta until barely done (7-9 minutes).
5. Drain the pasta and immediately add it to the sauce.
6. Cover the pot tightly and let stand for 4 minutes to cook scallops.
7. Remove lid, stir in Parmesan cheese, and serve.
